infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Speedi uses your location to show nearby tradespeople and broadcast your availability when you're toggled live.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: While you're toggled live, Speedi keeps your pin updated as you move between jobs — even when the app is in the background or your phone is locked. Tracking stops immediately when you toggle offline.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Speedi uses the camera to take profile photos and document your verified credentials.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Speedi accesses your photos to upload your profile picture and credential documents.
